---
title: "Welcome to Rheum with a View"
description: |
  Welcome to our new blog, Rheum with a View. We hope you enjoy 
  reading what we have to say!
author:
  - name: Robert Corty
    url: https://rcorty.github.io
    affiliation: VUMC
    affiliation_url: https://www.vumc.org/main/home
date: 04-30-2021
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating blogs with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/blog.html

```
